content.content:
Sprint 14 Task Assignments (2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18)

Task ID  | Description                               | Assignee          | Points | Due Date   | Status
---------|-------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------|------------|------------
HEL-241  | Dashboard: data table component           | Fatima Al-Rashid  | 5      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress
HEL-242  | Dashboard: chart rendering module         | Tomas Rivera      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | In Progress
HEL-243  | Data ingestion: date format normalization | Amir Hassan       | 5      | 2026-07-15 | Blocked
HEL-244  | Integration test suite: auth flows        | Kenji Watanabe    | 3      | 2026-07-14 | Done
HEL-245  | Integration test suite: data pipeline     | Kenji Watanabe    | 5      | 2026-07-18 | In Progress
HEL-246  | UAT environment: server provisioning      | Nadia Petrov      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | At Risk
HEL-247  | Performance benchmark: dashboard load     | Derek Okafor      | 3      | 2026-07-18 | Not Started
HEL-248  | GeoSync license renewal coordination      | Raj Patel         | 2      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

=== Test Suite: Authentication Flows ===
TC-401  OAuth token issuance              PASS
TC-402  Token refresh                     PASS
TC-403  Expired token rejection           PASS
TC-404  Invalid scope rejection           PASS
Suite result: 4/4 PASS

=== Test Suite: Data Pipeline — Batch Ingestion ===
TC-501  CSV ingestion (10k records)                  PASS
TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS
TC-503  XML ingestion (5k records)                   PASS
TC-504  Date normalization (ISO 8601 input)          PASS
TC-505  Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY input)        FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-014]
TC-506  Duplicate record detection                   PASS
TC-507  Large file ingestion (500k records)          FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-015]
Suite result: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL

=== Test Suite: Dashboard ===
TC-601  Data table rendering (10k records)           PASS
TC-602  Chart rendering — line chart                 IN PROGRESS
TC-603  Chart rendering — bar chart                  NOT RUN
TC-604  Load time benchmark (100k records)           NOT RUN
Suite result: 1/4 complete

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.
           Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15).

HEL-D-015  Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow.
           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

content.text: I’ve identified the highest-risk tasks from both logs — I’ll now compile the deadline assessment for you.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Assessment Date: Based on sprint_14_task_assignments.txt and helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt (through 2026-07-11)

Sprint Deadline: 2026-07-18
Overall Test Status: 10/15 executed, 2 FAIL open, 3 not yet run

TASKS AT HIGH RISK OF MISSING SPRINT DEADLINE:

1. HEL-243 - Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-15 | Status: Blocked
   Reason: Explicitly Blocked. Linked to 2 HIGH severity defects:
     - HEL-D-014: Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input (affects ~40% of Meridian source data). Blocked pending Meridian sample data due 2026-07-15 (same day as task due).
     - HEL-D-015: Large file ingestion >200k records causes memory overflow/crash at 210k. Root cause under investigation.
   Evidence: helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt shows TC-505 FAIL and TC-507 FAIL in Data Pipeline suite (5/7 PASS). Cannot close without unblocking data dependency and fixing memory issue.
   Risk: Very High - directly impacts data pipeline integrity.

2. HEL-246 - UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov | Points: 8 | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: At Risk
   Reason: Task itself flagged as "At Risk" in assignments. 8 points is largest alongside HEL-242. No test coverage in testing log, suggesting environment not ready, which will block downstream integration/UAT testing.
   Risk: Very High

3. HEL-245 - Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: In Progress
   Reason: Depends on HEL-243 fixes. Testing log shows 2 FAILs (TC-505, TC-507) in batch ingestion suite. Cannot complete suite until HEL-D-014 and HEL-D-015 resolved. Due on final sprint day (07-18) leaves no buffer.
   Risk: High - blocked by upstream task HEL-243.

4. HEL-247 - Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor | Points: 3 | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: Not Started
   Reason: Not Started with 7 days left in sprint at time of last test log (07-11). Dashboard test suite shows TC-604 Load time benchmark NOT RUN. Depends on HEL-241 and HEL-242 completion.
   Risk: High

5. HEL-242 - Dashboard: chart rendering module
   Assignee: Tomas Rivera | Points: 8 | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: In Progress
   Reason: Large effort (8 points). Dashboard test suite incomplete: TC-602 IN PROGRESS, TC-603 NOT RUN. Dashboard cannot be fully verified until rendering complete.
   Risk: Medium-High - may slip past due date 07-16 toward sprint end.

TASKS AT LOWER RISK:

- HEL-241 - Dashboard: data table component (Due 2026-07-14, In Progress): TC-601 PASS indicates core functionality works. Likely to close with minor effort despite In Progress status. Risk: Low-Medium.
- HEL-244 - Integration test suite: auth flows (Done, Due 07-14): 4/4 PASS in Auth test suite. Risk: None.
- HEL-248 - GeoSync license renewal coordination (Due 07-14, In Progress, 2 points): Small coordination task, not tied to failing tests. Risk: Low.

SUMMARY:
Primary blockers are data ingestion defects (HEL-243) which cascade to HEL-245. Secondary risks are UAT environment provisioning (HEL-246) and unstarted performance benchmark (HEL-247). Chart rendering (HEL-242) needs close monitoring due to size and incomplete tests.

Recommendation: Prioritize unblocking HEL-243 (Meridian sample data and memory fix), escalate HEL-246, and ensure HEL-241 closes to unblock HEL-247 benchmark.

content.text:
Assessment complete. I analyzed **sprint_14_task_assignments.txt** and **helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt** and identified tasks at risk:

**High/Very High Risk:**
- **HEL-243** (Blocked) - 2 HIGH severity defects open (HEL-D-014 date normalization, HEL-D-015 memory overflow), blocked on external data due same day as task due
- **HEL-246** (At Risk) - 8pt UAT provisioning task flagged at risk
- **HEL-245** - Depends on HEL-243, 2 test failures (TC-505, TC-507), due final day 07-18
- **HEL-247** - Not Started as of 07-11, depends on dashboard tasks, benchmark test NOT RUN
- **HEL-242** - 8pts, chart rendering tests IN PROGRESS / NOT RUN

Lower risk tasks (HEL-241, HEL-244 Done, HEL-248) were also evaluated.

The full detailed assessment has been written to **sprint14_deadline_risk.txt**.
